title: राम सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री राम सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम् ॥

॥ विनियोगः ॥
अस्य श्री रामसहस्रनाम स्तोत्र महामन्त्रस्य
शिव ऋषिः। अनुष्टुप् छन्दः।
श्री सीतारामचन्द्रो देवता। श्रीं बीजम्। ह्रीं शक्तिः। रां कीलकम्।
श्री सीतारामचन्द्र प्रीत्यर्थे जपे विनियोगः॥

॥ ध्यानम् ॥
ध्यायेदाजानुबाहुं धृतशरधनुषं बद्धपद्मासनस्थं
पीतं वासो वसानं नवकमलदलस्पर्धिनेत्रं प्रसन्नम्।
वामाङ्कारूढसीतामुखकमलमिलल्लोचनं नीरदाभं
नानालंकारदीप्तं दधतमुरुजटामण्डलं रामचन्द्रम्॥१॥

रामो राजमणिः सदा विजयते रामं रमेशं भजे
रामेणाभिहता निशाचरचमू रामाय तस्मै नमः।
रामान्नास्ति परायणं परतरं रामस्य दासोऽस्म्यहं
रामे चित्तलयः सदा भवतु मे भो राम मामुद्धर॥२॥

श्रीरामं जानकीकान्तं रत्नकुण्डलभूषितम्।
पीतवासससमाक्रान्तं धनुर्बाणधरं विभुम्॥
चतुर्भुजं दीर्घनेत्रं ध्यायेत्सीतापतिं हरिम्॥३॥

॥ स्तोत्रम् ॥

रामो रामचन्द्रश्च रामभद्रश्च शाश्वतः।
राजीवलोचनो राजा रघुवंशसमुद्भवः॥१॥

रघुनाथो रघुश्रेष्ठो रघुनन्दनवर्धनः।
रामेशः सीतानाथश्च लक्ष्मीवान् लक्ष्मणाग्रजः॥२॥

कौसल्येयो दशरथिः सर्वलोकप्रियंकरः।
विश्वामित्रप्रियो दान्तः शत्रुघ्नः सेतुकृत्प्रभुः॥३॥

कोदण्डधारी कौसल्यानन्दनो रावणान्तकः।
महायोगी महातेजा महावीरो रघूत्तमः॥४॥

जानकीवल्लभो रामः साकेतपतिरीश्वरः।
पुण्डरीकाक्ष सर्वज्ञो मर्यादापुरुषोत्तमः॥५॥

नीलमेघश्यामवर्णो मुकुन्दो मोक्षदायकः।
पिताम हभ्राता वत्सो हनुमत्प्रभुरीश्वरः॥६॥

सुग्रीवेशो वालिघातिनो जटायुश्चितप्रदः।
शबरीफलभोक्ता च राघवः सत्यविक्रमः॥७॥

देवदेवो महादेवो मायामानुषविग्रहः।
सर्वदेवमयो विष्णुर्नारायणोऽनघो हरिः॥८॥

क्षीराब्धिशायी भगवान् गोविन्दो गोपतिः प्रभुः।
श्रीधरः श्रीपतिः श्रेष्ठो गरुडध्वजकेतनः॥९॥

वनवासी धनुर्वेदी तापसः सत्यवादिकः।
सर्वप्राणिहिते रतो भक्तवत्सलवर्धनः॥१०॥

त्रैलोक्यरक्षको धन्वी बालिबन्धनवारणः।
सेतुबन्धनकर्ता च लंकादाहनकारकः॥११॥

कुम्भकर्णशिरश्छेदी दशकण्ठविनाशनः।
विभीषणप्रियो दिव्यो ऋषभो रामवल्लभः॥१२॥

पतितपावनो बालो रामो धर्मभृतां वरः।
क्षमावान् शीलसम्पन्नो गुणवान् निर्गुणात्मकः॥१३॥

धर्मो धर्मपतिर्धर्म्यो धर्मात्मा धर्मवत्सलः।
सत्यप्रतिज्ञः सत्यात्मा सत्यवादी सतां गतिः॥१४॥

कारुण्यं करुणारूपः करुणापतिरुत्तमः।
कारुण्यसागरो रामो दीनबन्धुर्दयानिधिः॥१५॥

कोसलेन्द्रो जगत्पालः शिवलिङ्गप्रतिष्ठकः।
वैकुण्ठनाथो भूपालो गजराजमहाबलः॥१६॥

पुराणपुरुषो विश्वो विश्वरूपो महेश्वरः।
विश्वभोक्ता विश्ववन्द्यो विश्वात्मा विश्वनायकः॥१७॥

सर्वबन्धविमोक्ता च सर्वपापप्रणाशनः।
सर्वदारिद्र्यशमनो सर्वशोकनिवारणः॥१८॥

सर्वैश्वर्यविधाता च सर्वमंगलकारकः।
सर्वभूतहिते रतः सर्वज्ञः सर्वतोमुखः॥१९॥

आनन्दो रामभद्रश्च रामो राजीवलोचनः।
पापहारी क्षमाशीलः शरण्यः करुणानिधिः॥२०॥

त्रेतायुगावतारी च विश्वम्भरधरो धृतिः।
सृष्टिस्थित्यन्तकारी च ब्रह्मा विष्णुर्महेश्वरः॥२१॥

राम इत्यक्षरद्वन्द्वं सर्वमन्त्रेषु चोत्तमम्।
अग्निश्चन्द्रश्च द्वावेतौ रकारे मकारकौ॥२२॥

धनुर्धरो धनुर्वेदी शरण्यः शरणप्रदः।
सर्ववेदमयो विप्रः सर्ववेदविदां वरः॥२३॥

राजराजो महाराजो विश्वनाथो जगत्प्रभुः।
सीताभूसुतकान्तश्च राजराजेश्वरः प्रभुः॥२४॥

रामो दाशरथिः श्रीमान् राजेन्द्रो रघुपुंगवः।
श्रीरामचन्द्रसहस्रनामैतत्पुण्यदं सदा॥२५॥

नित्यं यः पठते भक्त्या सर्वपापैः प्रमुच्यते।
सर्वसिद्धिमवाप्नोति रामचन्द्रप्रसादतः॥२६॥

अयोध्या वासिनो रामं दशरथात्मजं प्रभुम्।
मिथिलेशसुतानाथं सर्वभूतहितंकरम्॥२७॥

परमानन्दरूपं च सच्चिदानन्दविग्रहम्।
रामं ध्यायेत्सदा भक्त्या पापं नश्यत्यसंशयम्॥२८॥

लक्ष्मणश्च महातेजा भरतः शत्रुघ्न एव च।
सहायाः सर्वदा रामं वन्दे रामं रघूत्तमम्॥२९॥

रामो राजा महाराजो राघवो रणपण्डितः।
सर्वदेवमयो दिव्यो हरिर्नारायणो विभुः॥३०॥

॥ फलश्रुतिः ॥
सहस्रनामैतद्दिव्यं रामचन्द्रस्य धीमतः।
यः पठेत्प्रातरुत्थाय सर्वपापैः प्रमुच्यते॥

सर्वसम्पत्समृद्धिं च सर्वसौख्यमवाप्नुयात्।
भक्तिं श्रीरामचन्द्रस्य लभते नात्र संशयः॥

॥ इति श्री पद्मपुराणोक्तं श्री राम सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम् (ध्यानम् एवं प्रथम ६०+ नामानि) ॥

॥ ॐ श्रीरामाय नमः ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Rama Sahasranama Stotram ||

|| Viniyogah ||
Asya Shri Rama-sahasranama Stotra Mahamantrasya
Shiva Rishiph. Anushtup Chhandah.
Shri Sita-Ramachandro Devata. Shrim Bijam. Hrim Shaktih. Ram Kilakam.
Shri Sita-Ramachandra Prityarthe Jape Viniyogah.

|| Dhyanam ||
Dhyayed-ajanu-bahum Dhrita-shara-dhanusham Baddha-padmasana-stham
Pitam Vaso Vasanam Nava-kamala-dala-spardhi-netram Prasannam.
Vama-anka-arudha-Sita-mukha-kamala-milal-lochanam Nirada-abham
Nana-alamkara-diptam Dadhatam-uru-jata-mandalam Ramachandram.||1||

Ramo Rajamaniihi Sada Vijayate Ramam Ramesham Bhaje
Ramena-abhihata Nishachara-chamu Ramaya Tasmai Namah.
Raman-nasti Parayanam Parataram Ramasya Daso'smy-aham
Rame Chitta-layah Sada Bhavatu Me Bho Rama Mam-uddhara.||2||

Shriramam Janaki-kantam Ratna-kundala-bhushitam.
Pita-vasasa-samakrantam Dhanur-bana-dharam Vibhum.
Chaturbhujam Dirgha-netram Dhyayet-Sita-patim Harim.||3||

|| Stotram ||

Ramo Ramachandrash-cha Ramabhadrash-cha Shashvatah.
Rajiva-lochano Raja Raghu-vamsha-samudbhavah.||1||

Raghunathao Raghu-shreshtho Raghu-nandana-vardhanah.
Rameshah Sita-nathash-cha Lakshmivan Lakshmana-agrajah.||2||

Kausalyeyo Dasharathih Sarva-loka-priyamkarah.
Vishvamitra-priyo Dantah Shatrughnah Setukrit-prabhuh.||3||

Kodanda-dhari Kausalya-nandano Ravanantakah.
Mahayogi Mahateja Mahaviro Raghuttamah.||4||

Janaki-vallabho Ramah Saketa-patir-ishvarah.
Pundarikaksha Sarvajno Maryada-purushottamah.||5||

Nila-megha-shyama-varno Mukundo Moksha-dayakah.
Pitamaha-bhrata Vatso Hanumat-prabhur-ishvarah.||6||

Sugrivesho Vali-ghatino Jatayu-shchita-pradah.
Shabari-phala-bhokta cha Raghavah Satya-vikramah.||7||

Deva-devo Mahadevo Maya-manusha-vigrahah.
Sarva-deva-mayo Vishnur-Narayano'nagho Harih.||8||

Kshirabdhi-shayi Bhagavan Govindo Gopatih Prabhuh.
Shri-dharah Shri-patih Shreshtho Garuda-dhvaja-ketanah.||9||

Vana-vasi Dhanur-vedi Tapasah Satya-vadikah.
Sarva-prani-hite Rato Bhakta-vatsala-vardhanah.||10||

Trailokya-rakshako Dhanvi Bali-bandhana-varanah.
Setu-bandhana-karta cha Lanka-dahana-karakah.||11||

Kumbhakarna-shirash-chhedi Dasha-kantha-vinashanah.
Vibhishana-priyo Divyo Rishabho Rama-vallabhah.||12||

Patita-pavano Balo Ramo Dharma-bhritam Varah.
Kshamavan Shila-sampanno Gunavan Nirguna-atmakah.||13||

Dharmo Dharma-patir-dharmyo Dharmatma Dharma-vatsalah.
Satya-pratijnah Satya-atma Satya-vadi Satam Gatih.||14||

Karunyam Karuna-rupah Karuna-patir-uttamah.
Karunya-sagaro Ramo Dina-bandhur-dayanidhi.||15||

Kosalendro Jagat-palah Shiva-linga-pratishtakah.
Vaikuntha-natho Bhupalo Gajaraja-mahabalah.||16||

Purana-purusho Vishvo Vishva-rupo Maheshvarah.
Vishva-bhokta Vishva-vandyo Vishvatma Vishva-nayakah.||17||

Sarva-bandha-vimokta cha Sarva-papa-pranashanah.
Sarva-daridrya-shamano Sarva-shoka-nivaranah.||18||

Sarvaishvarya-vidhata cha Sarva-mangala-karakah.
Sarva-bhuta-hite Ratah Sarvajnah Sarvato-mukhah.||19||

Anando Ramabhadrash-cha Ramo Rajiva-lochanah.
Papa-hari Kshama-shilah Sharanyah Karuna-nidhih.||20||

Tretayuga-avatari cha Vishvambhara-dharo Dhritih.
Srishti-sthity-anta-kari cha Brahma Vishnur-Maheshvarah.||21||

Rama Ity-akshara-dvandvam Sarva-mantreshu Chottamam.
Agnish-chandrash-cha Dvav-etau Rakare Makare.||22||

Dhanur-dharo Dhanur-vedi Sharanyah Sharana-pradah.
Sarva-veda-mayo Viprah Sarva-veda-vidam Varah.||23||

Raja-rajo Maharajo Vishva-natho Jagat-prabhuh.
Sita-bhusuta-kantash-cha Raja-rajeshvarah Prabhuh.||24||

Ramo Dasharathih Shriman Rajendro Raghu-pungavah.
Shriramachandra-sahasra-namaitatpunya-dam Sada.||25||

Nityam Yah Pathate Bhaktya Sarva-papaih Pramuchyate.
Sarva-siddhim-avapnoti Ramachandra-prasadatah.||26||

Ayodhya Vasino Ramam Dasharathatmajam Prabhum.
Mithilesha-suta-natham Sarva-bhuta-hitamkaram.||27||

Paramananda-rupam cha Sachchidananda-vigraham.
Ramam Dhyayet-sada Bhaktya Papam Nashyaty-asamshayam.||28||

Lakshmanash-cha Mahateja Bharatah Shatrughna Eva cha.
Sahayah Sarvada Ramam Vande Ramam Raghuttamam.||29||

Ramo Raja Maharajo Raghavo Rana-panditah.
Sarva-deva-mayo Divyo Harir-narayano Vibhuh.||30||

|| Phalashrutih ||
Sahasra-namaitad-divyam Ramachandrasya Dhimatah.
Yah Pathet-pratar-utthaya Sarva-papaih Pramuchyate.

Sarva-sampat-samriddhim cha Sarva-saukhyam-avapnuyat.
Bhaktim Shri-Ramachandrasya Labhate Natra Samshayah.

|| Iti Shri Padma-puranoktam Shri Rama Sahasranama Stotram (Dhyanam evam Prathama 60+ Namani) ||

|| Om Shriramaya Namah ||
hindiMeaning:
ध्यान श्लोक का अर्थ: जानु (घुटनों) तक लम्बी भुजाओं वाले, शर-धनुष धारण किए, पद्मासन में स्थित, पीतवस्त्र पहने, नवकमल दल से स्पर्धा करने वाले नेत्रों वाले, प्रसन्न, वामांक पर सीता जी विराजमान, मेघ के समान श्याम, अनेक अलंकारों से दीप्त, विशाल जटामण्डल वाले रामचन्द्र का ध्यान करें।

राम, रामचन्द्र, रामभद्र, शाश्वत, राजीवलोचन, रघुवंश में जन्मे, रघुनाथ, रघुश्रेष्ठ, सीतानाथ, लक्ष्मण के अग्रज, कौसल्या के पुत्र, दशरथ के पुत्र, मर्यादापुरुषोत्तम — ये सहस्रनाम में श्रीराम के दिव्य नाम हैं।

वे कोदण्ड (धनुष) धारी, रावणान्तक, वनवासी, तपस्वी, सत्यवादी, करुणासागर, दीनबन्धु, पतितपावन, धर्मभृतां वर, सच्चिदानन्दविग्रह हैं।

प्रातःकाल इन सहस्रनामों के पाठ से सभी पाप नष्ट होते हैं, सर्वसम्पत्ति और सर्वसुख प्राप्त होता है।

viniyog.shloka: अस्य श्रीramasahasranamaमन्त्रस्य शिव ऋषिः। अनुष्टुप् छन्दः। श्री सीतारामचन्द्र देवता। श्रीं बीजम्। ह्रीं शक्तिः। रां कीलकम्। श्रीसीतारामचन्द्रप्रीत्यर्थे जपे विनियोगः॥

benefits: Supreme hymn containing 1000 names of Lord Rama for righteousness and protection
Traditionally recited for removal of all sins and bestows complete prosperity and happiness
Invokes devotion to lord rama and leads to spiritual liberation
Invokes Rama as Maryada Purushottama for dharmic guidance
Classical tradition invokes this for removal of sorrows, poverty, and bondage from the devotee's life
Morning recitation ensures divine grace and all-round success
description: Dedicated to Lord Rama, the Rama Sahasranama Stotram (राम सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम्) is a sacred recitation of 1000 divine names revered in Hindu tradition. Drawn from Padma Purana, this text has been cherished by devotees for centuries. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to invoke Rama as Maryada Purushottama for dharmic guidance as well as remove all sorrows, poverty, and bondage from the devotee's life. Additionally, it is known to supreme hymn containing 1000 names of Lord Rama for righteousness and protection. This sacred text is ideally recited on Saturday (Shanivar) and during Ram Navami for enhanced blessings. Comprising 30 verses, it can be completed in approximately 30 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Rama Sahasranama Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Rama Sahasranama in Sanskrit with dhyana shlokas and Hindi meaning. 1000 names of Lord Rama for righteousness, protection, and moksha.

seoFaqs.question: Where is the Rama Sahasranama preserved in Hindu scripture?
seoFaqs.answer: The most widely recited Rama Sahasranama (1,000 names of Rama) is preserved in the Padma Purana, where it is presented as a dialogue between Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati. Shiva narrates the names to Parvati as the supreme purificatory chant. A second well-known Rama Sahasranama is found in the Adhyatma Ramayana within the Brahmanda Purana, presented in the context of Rama's divine identity as Brahman. Both versions list one thousand names of Rama in the form of a litany suited for sequential chanting, often combined with anga-nyasa, kara-nyasa and dhyana verses for formal recitation.

seoFaqs.question: What is the significance of the famous 'Rama Rameti' verse from the Padma Purana?
seoFaqs.answer: The Padma Purana contains one of the most quoted shlokas in Vaishnava tradition: 'Sri Rama Rama Rameti Rame Rame Manorame, Sahasranama Tattulyam Rama Nama Varanane.' Spoken by Shiva to Parvati, it declares: 'Chanting the name Rama just once is equal to chanting the thousand names of Vishnu, O lovely-faced one.' The verse is significant because it equates a single repetition of Rama's name with the entire Vishnu Sahasranama, indicating the unique potency of the Rama mantra. Many devotees, when short of time, recite this single shloka three times in lieu of either sahasranama, drawing on its claimed equivalence.

seoFaqs.question: How does Rama Sahasranama differ from Vishnu Sahasranama?
seoFaqs.answer: Vishnu Sahasranama, preserved in the Anushasana Parva of the Mahabharata, lists the thousand names of Vishnu as the cosmic, all-pervading principle, recited by Bhishma to Yudhishthira. Rama Sahasranama, in contrast, lists names focused specifically on Rama as the avatar in the Treta Yuga: his birth in Ayodhya, his role as Maryada Purushottama (the ideal man), his exile, the destruction of Ravana, and his establishment of Rama-rajya. Theologically the names ultimately point to the same supreme reality, but devotionally Rama Sahasranama emphasises the personal, biographical Rama while Vishnu Sahasranama emphasises the cosmic, unmanifest Vishnu.

seoFaqs.question: When and how is Rama Sahasranama traditionally chanted?
seoFaqs.answer: Rama Navami (the appearance day of Rama on Chaitra Shukla Navami) is the most auspicious annual occasion. Within each lunar month, the navami tithi, the dvadashi, and Ekadashi are favoured. Tuesdays and Thursdays are weekly Rama days in many traditions. A simple practice: bathe, sit facing east, light a ghee lamp before an image of Rama-Sita-Lakshmana-Hanuman, perform brief Ganesh Vandana and dhyana of Rama, and recite the sahasranama with attention. Many devotees use a tulsi mala for counting; one full sahasranama recitation is itself counted as one round. Group chanting on Ram Navami at temples is widespread.

seoFaqs.question: What benefits do classical sources attribute to Rama Sahasranama recitation?
seoFaqs.answer: The Padma Purana explicitly states that recitation of Rama nama destroys accumulated karma across many lifetimes, since the Rama mantra is considered the most sattvic (pure) vibration in the entire mantra tradition. Specific benefits listed include purification of mind, removal of mental turbulence, protection from fears and enemies, success in dharmic undertakings, harmony in family life, and ultimately moksha through Rama's grace. The text also emphasises that bhava (devotional feeling) matters more than mechanical recitation: chanting one name with devotion is described as more effective than reciting the entire sahasranama without inner participation.
